Q: What is the key idea about indira gandhi delhi technical university for women established?
A: Indira Gandhi Delhi Technical University for Women (Established by Govt.

Q: What is the key idea about of delhi vide act 09 of 2012 kashmere?
A: of Delhi vide Act 09 of 2012) Kashmere Gate, Delhi-110006 Bachelor of Technology MAE & DMAM (Second Year) Teaching Scheme & Syllabus Academic Session: 2025-26 Page 1 of 34.

Q: What is the key idea about mechanical and automation engineering/dmam third semester s no?
A: – Mechanical and Automation Engineering/DMAM Third Semester S No Type of Course Subject L-T-P Code Credits Numerical Techniques for 1.

Q: What is the key idea about basic sciences 2-0-2 bas 203 3 engineers 2?
A: Basic Sciences 2-0-2 BAS 203 3 Engineers 2.

Q: What is the key idea about dcc production technology i 2-0-2 bma 201 3?
A: DCC Production Technology - I 2-0-2 BMA 201 3 3.

Q: What is the key idea about dcc engineering materials 2-0-2 bma 202 3 4?
A: DCC Engineering Materials 2-0-2 BMA 202 3 4.

Q: What is the key idea about dcc thermal engineering i 2-0-2 bma 203 3?
A: DCC Thermal Engineering - I 2-0-2 BMA 203 3 5.

Q: What is the key idea about dcc strength of materials 2-0-2 bma 210 3?
A: DCC Strength of Materials 2-0-2 BMA 210 3 Logistics & Supply Chain BMA 211 Management Refrigeration and Air-Conditioning BMA 212 3-0-0/ Introduction to Autonomous Mobile 3 6.
